Title: Welcome to the new Self Service Portal
Body: We have launched a completely redesigned Self Service Portal with improved navigation, faster load times, and a new dark mode. Check it out and let us know what you think in the #cloud-engineering Slack channel.

Title: Kubernetes 1.32 upgrade scheduled for May
Body: We will be upgrading all clusters to Kubernetes 1.32 on May 12th. There will be a brief rolling restart of workloads. No action is required from capability teams, but please review the changelog for any deprecations that may affect you.

Title: New ECR lifecycle policies in effect
Body: Automatic cleanup policies have been applied to all ECR repositories. Images older than 90 days that are not tagged as 'latest' or with a semantic version will be pruned. Reach out to Cloud Engineering if you have questions.
